name: server-messages
description: Broadcasts scheduled server announcements using sequential or weighted shuffle-bag rotation.

messages.description: Messages to broadcast. Supports {playerCount} and {serverName}. Unsupported placeholder typos are rejected at install time. Weight only affects random order. Limit 100 messages. Message text must include at least one non-whitespace character.

text.title: Broadcast message text
text.description: The message text to broadcast. Supports {playerCount} and {serverName}. Whitespace-only messages are rejected at install time. Unsupported placeholder typos are rejected at install time. Example: Welcome! There are {playerCount} players online.

weight.title: Message weight
weight.description: Relative frequency in random weighted shuffle-bag mode. Weight must be a whole number from 1 to 100. Use 1 for normal frequency and larger values to make a message appear more often in random mode.

order.description: Broadcast order. Random uses a weighted shuffle bag.

broadcast.description: Broadcast the next configured server message
